text: Project Apollo uses Stripe for billing and stores invoices in invoices.md.
Project Borealis uses Paddle for billing and stores receipts in receipts.md.
Project Ceres uses Clerk for authentication and keeps auth notes in auth.md.
Project Dione stores production data in Neon Postgres and migrations in db/migrations.
Project Europa uses Redis for rate limits and session cache.
Fornax file ingestion supports PDF, DOCX, XLSX, images, and OCR previews.
Gemini deployment runs on Cloud Run in europe-west3 only; europe-west1 is deprecated.
Helix security policy requires local encryption, audit logs, and passphrase-protected vaults.
Iris routes lightweight tasks through GPT-5-nano and complex reasoning through Claude Haiku 4.6.
Janus connects WhatsApp through Baileys and avoids the WhatsApp Business API.
Kepler stores generated media in Cloudflare R2 with signed URLs.
Luna launch plan uses Product Hunt, Hacker News, X, Dev.to, and Telegram.
Mimas has a zero data harvesting policy and isolates tenant data by workspace.
Nova CV optimizer rewrites expat resumes for European corporate recruiters.
Orion finds hiring teams with Proxycurl and drafts short connection messages.
Phoenix backup flow exports encrypted archives and verifies Merkle roots.
Quasar UI uses Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui components.
Rhea managed memory uses Supabase RPC functions for vector search.
Selene agent memory must separate user facts from project plans.
Titan release process builds wheels, checks metadata, and publishes to PyPI.
Marco prefers answers in Italian but stores technical notes in English.
Berlin relocation notes mention Anmeldung, tax ID, and health insurance deadlines.
Munich candidate offer package includes relocation bonus and hybrid work policy.
Salento screenplay notes include Griko villages, fictional republic, and coastal trade.

Project Lyra uses Baileys for WhatsApp experiments and stores bot notes in lyra-whatsapp.md.
Project Vela compares WhatsApp Cloud API, 360dialog, and Twilio for enterprise messaging.
Project Atlas documents OpenAI-compatible API gateways, base URLs, model aliases, and routing policies.
